violations.text: The plumbing under the three bay sink was observed leaking when dishwasher was running. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to fix leak under three bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The lighting in the walk in cooler is inadequate. Lighting in walk in cooler must be corrected so establishment is able to visually inspect items in walk in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
